'''Forsen''' was a lush [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was part of the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]].

{{Planet-stub}}
